---
title: "Game of Thrones Viewership Report"
author: "Tam Nguyen Bang_475308"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)

tv <- read_csv("data/viewership_cleaned.csv")
summary_stats <- read_csv("data/summary_stats.csv")
season_summary <- read_csv("data/season_summary.csv")

first_episode <- tv[1, ]
last_episode <- tv[nrow(tv), ]

highest_episode <- tv %>% filter(viewers == max(viewers, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% slice(1)
lowest_episode  <- tv %>% filter(viewers == min(viewers, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% slice(1)

largest_increase <- tv %>% filter(change_from_previous == max(change_from_previous, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% slice(1)
largest_drop     <- tv %>% filter(change_from_previous == min(change_from_previous, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% slice(1)

avg_viewers <- mean(tv$viewers, na.rm = TRUE)
overall_change <- last_episode$viewers - first_episode$viewers
